- Binance to suspend crypto services in several EU countries
  Binance, the world's largest cryptocurrency exchange by volume, said it had applied for authorisation to operate under the EU's crypto assets regulation MiCA in Greece. It has now withdrawn that application and will apply in another EU country.
  🔗 https://economictimes.indiatimes.com/markets/cryptocurrency/crypto-news/binance-to-suspend-crypto-services-in-several-eu-countries/articleshow/132000125.cms

- US inflation tops 4% for first time in three years, keeping Fed hike in play
  US inflation climbed to 4.1% in May, driven by rising energy prices. Consumer spending surged, bolstered by tax refunds and a stock market rally. Business investment in equipment also rebounded, particularly in AI-related technology.
  🔗 https://economictimes.indiatimes.com/markets/us-stocks/news/us-may-pce-inflation-rises-4-1-keeping-fed-hike-in-play/articleshow/131997380.cms
